docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,272.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT 538-542 CLAYTON STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-19-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, SERVICE FEE: $120.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 538-542 CLAYTON STREET LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL SARMIENTO, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO, SR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT 538-542 CLAYTON STREET LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 538-542 CLAYTON STREET LLC $1,272.18 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,392.18, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.
